meaning: n.<美>(在市区大楼之间建造的通常为封闭式的)人行天桥
examples: Skywalk: the ability to move laterally while in the air.
The skywalk is basically nothing but a steel structure pathway, a bit dull and depressing atmosphere.
Located 2.700 m above sea level, this cool skywalk is one of the most popular destinations in Styria, Austria.
Viewing the vast tranches of rock from the air on a helicopter ride or from the transparent Skywalk will be an unforgettable experience for any child.
The hotel is located in the busy, central area around Ratchaprasong (full of offices, shopping malls and embassies) and conveniently connected via skywalk to the Rajadamri BTS Skytrain station.
